_dotSize.desc: Radius of a single dot. Defaults to 1.5

_minWidth.desc: Minimum width of a line. Defaults to 0.5.

_maxWidth.desc: Maximum width of a line. Defaults to 2.5.

_throttle.desc: Draw the next point at most once per every x milliseconds. Set it to 0 to turn off throttling. Defaults to 16.

_minDistance.desc: Add the next point only if the previous one is farther than x pixels. Defaults to 5.

_backgroundColor.desc: Color used to clear the background. Can be any color format accepted by context.fillStyle. Defaults to rgba(0,0,0,0) (transparent black). Use a non-transparent color e.g. rgb(255,255,255) (opaque white) if you'd like to save signatures as JPEG images.

_penColor.desc: Color used to draw the lines. Can be any color format accepted by context.fillStyle. Defaults to black.

_velocityFilterWeight.desc: Weight used to modify new velocity based on the previous velocity. Defaults to 0.7.

_jstemplate: {id}_signaturePad = new SignaturePad({id}, {{{if dotSize<>''}dotSize:{dotSize}, {/if}{if minWidth<>''}minWidth:{minWidth}, {/if}{if maxWidth<>''}maxWidth:{maxWidth}, {/if}{if throttle<>''}throttle:{throttle}, {/if}{if minDistance<>''}minDistance:{minDistance}, {/if}{if backgroundColor<>''}backgroundColor:'{backgroundColor}', {/if}{if penColor<>''}penColor:'{penColor}', {/if}{if velocityFilterWeight<>''}velocityFilterWeight:{velocityFilterWeight}, {/if}}});
